prompt: Which course sections have the most overbooked ratio (enrolled / max)?

inputData.question: Which course sections have the most overbooked ratio (enrolled / max)?

response.bodyRaw:
{"status":"success","steps":{"input":{"question":"Which course sections have the most overbooked ratio (enrolled / max)?"},"sql":{"payload":{"question":"Which course sections have the most overbooked ratio (enrolled / max)?"},"startedAt":1771856079224,"status":"success","output":{"reasoning":"The question asks for course sections with the highest overbooked ratio (enrolled / max). I need to:
1. Count active enrollments per course_section_id from the enrollments table
2. Get max_students from course_sections table
3. Calculate the ratio (enrolled / max_students)
4. Join with courses to get course code/name for identification
5. Order by ratio descending to find the most overbooked sections

The schema confirms:
- course_sections has id, course_id, max_students
- enrollments has course_section_id and is_active flag
- courses has code and name for identification

I'll count active enrollments per section, calculate the ratio, and order by ratio descending.","sql":"
SELECT 
  c.code,
  c.name,
  cs.section_number,
  cs.academic_year,
  cs.semester_type,
  COUNT(e.id) AS enrolled_count,
  cs.max_students,
  ROUND(COUNT(e.id)::numeric / cs.max_students, 4) AS overbooked_ratio
FROM course_sections cs
JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.id
LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.id = e.course_section_id AND e.is_active = true
GROUP BY cs.id, c.code, c.name, cs.section_number, cs.academic_year, cs.semester_type, cs.max_students
ORDER BY overbooked_ratio DESC
","assumptions":["Overbooked ratio is calculated as active enrollments divided by max_students","Only active enrollments (is_active = true) are counted","Results are ordered by ratio in descending order to show most overbooked first"]},"endedAt":1771856108595},"run-raw-sql":{"payload":{"sql":"

  cs.max_students,
  ROUND(COUNT(e.id)::numeric / cs.max_students, 4) AS overbooked_ratio
FROM course_sections cs
JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.id
LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.id = e.course_section_id AND e.is_active = true
GROUP BY cs.id, c.code, c.name, cs.section_number, cs.academic_year, cs.semester_type, cs.max_students
ORDER BY overbooked_ratio DESC

ORDER BY overbooked_ratio SELECT 
  c.code,
  c.name,
  cs.section_number,
  cs.academic_year,
  cs.semester_type,
  COUNT(e.id) AS enrolled_count,
  cs.max_students,
  ROUND(COUNT(e.id)::numeric / cs.max_students, 4) AS overbooked_ratio
FROM course_sections cs
JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.id
LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.id = e.course_section_id AND e.is_active = true
GROUP BY cs.id, c.code, c.name, cs.section_number, cs.academic_year, cs.semester_type, cs.max_students
ORDER BY overbooked_ratio DESC

SELECT 
  c.code,
  c.name,
  cs.section_number,
  cs.academic_year,
  cs.semester_type,
  COUNT(e.id) AS enrolled_count,
  cs.max_students,
  ROUND(COUNT(e.id)::numeric / cs.max_students, 4) AS overbooked_ratio

LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.id = e.course_section_id AND e.is_active = true

ORDER BY overbooked_ratio DESC

visualization.title: Course Sections by Overbooked Ratio (Enrolled / Max Capacity)

resultRaw.sql:
SELECT 
  c.code,
  c.name,
  cs.section_number,
  cs.academic_year,
  cs.semester_type,
  COUNT(e.id) AS enrolled_count,
  cs.max_students,
  ROUND(COUNT(e.id)::numeric / cs.max_students, 4) AS overbooked_ratio
FROM course_sections cs
JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.id
LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.id = e.course_section_id AND e.is_active = true
GROUP BY cs.id, c.code, c.name, cs.section_number, cs.academic_year, cs.semester_type, cs.max_students
ORDER BY overbooked_ratio DESC

visualization.title: Course Sections by Overbooked Ratio (Enrolled / Max Capacity)

result.sql:
SELECT 
  c.code,
  c.name,
  cs.section_number,
  cs.academic_year,
  cs.semester_type,
  COUNT(e.id) AS enrolled_count,
  cs.max_students,
  ROUND(COUNT(e.id)::numeric / cs.max_students, 4) AS overbooked_ratio
FROM course_sections cs
JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.id
LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.id = e.course_section_id AND e.is_active = true
GROUP BY cs.id, c.code, c.name, cs.section_number, cs.academic_year, cs.semester_type, cs.max_students
ORDER BY overbooked_ratio DESC
